item.title: Is the world healing?
item.description: Got an interesting call this week from family in complete horror. Apparently something slipped through the echo chamber and made them look up if it was real. Then came the confession round. It started with, “You know [her husband] he has Fox News on all the time, it’s the only thing her watches really.” They do, in fact they play Fox news on satellite radio in their car. Wondering how this plays out. #memes #socially_awkward_awesome_penguin
item.dc:creator: Eddyrock

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1661 (make history colorful again)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
Hoping to do some serious birding today, gonna look for Pygmy Owls.
Hey chat, does anyone else remember the pre-2001 show *Seven Days*? The idea is that there's a secret time machine at Area 51 powered by fuel from the Roswell alien crash and they regularly go back in time to ~~preserve American Hegemony~~ save the day from the disaster of the week by fixing the problem or something of that sort. Can't imagine why it rapidly lost popularity after September of 2001. I think I had a dream based around it, which is why it's on my mind this AM. Also in one episode they do go back in time to stop a Fascist takeover of America. Can't imagine why that episode is on my mind, either.
OH yeah in another episode they prevent an AI takeover too, come to think of it. An actual AI though, not this LLM shit.
This is adorable.
Bwahahahhaha
Make historical movies more colorful. People fucking loved color.
The most dangerous tiny gun-knife.
*Scotland actually, but yeah.
Or looking at a proper historical bronze sword replica.....
This did not end well for the Mexíca.
Pippin tax Today's message from Pippin: "Pippin! Pippin?" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Deviousness Day 166
item.description:
The above image was made by the wonderful CammyJay! They have their own channel in the deviousness discord where they share artwork and sometimes do drawings based on word prompts given by members. its a lot of fun! I has a Deviousness discord server! We do have a hard rule of no politics and/or religion. The discord is a safe space to get away from the bullshit going on. We have a bunch of areas including a SFW area, content creator area, a NSFW area and more! We have gaming fun! We have spontaneous gaming and some ping roles for people to use to get groups together based on US and EU time zones! We have movie nights on some Saturdays! So feel free to wander in and say haii! Thank you to everyone who has joined and made it such a unique and special place! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness If you have issues with link see dis: https://imgur.com/a/8GUNAz4 Deviousness steam group: https://steamcommunity.com/groups/DeviousnessDiscord
artist of work above (aside from my signing potato on it): https://florahv.artstation.com/projects/XnL8P3 was my birthday the other day yay. know previously people have giftied me some stuffs via throne, steam, ko-fi (fees tho ugh), and cashapp from people appreciating what I do with memes here, the discord things and/or just for fun of my birthday towards things. rn id accept cashapp or! united miles. cause have been traveling a lot. so if anyone has united milage they dont use/want since i know there are business like people who have travel for the business things that their work pays for and have seen it around on imgur. if anyone wants to gift me some miles for future travel things lemme know. id take some miles. cause. miles. united just changed their earn rates so just when im starting to travel they have made it more painful for those of us that cant qualify for their cards to earn and do like. award flights or upgrades on 15 hour flights with miles things. Mind you I am in no way begging or expecting things. and also know people have gifted me things in the past so if you want to please poke me via dm here since I would like to direct that occasional generosity I have received from people towards things I could use since I dont game much anymore and not doing throne again since planning on moving at some point so trying to limit my physical stuff until that happens in the next few years. thanks! I am on dis now and trying to remember to linky over there too for when I post and also post the memes that get removed: https://bsky.app/profile/potatocheesmonk.bsky.social I has a post with links to all my past posts. enjoy: https://imgur.com/a/ZDA2CBe #potato #memes #deviousness #makinmywaydowntown
item.dc:creator: PotatoCheesMonk

item.title: Memes/tomfoolery
item.description:
I'm not sure, but I'm going to guess sourdough starter
Yeah, I don't know them kids
I'm starting to think some of these were pilfered out of a Muppets dump
Anyone else miss when you could assume something was said ironically?
Yeah, a Muppets dump was definitely involved here.
You got to listen to the heart, listen to the beat. Listen to the rhythm, the rhythm of the street.
In their defense they had already named the meatball, the bumper, the hard hat, ice cream scoops, foot rests, leg warmers, hand warmers, ice makers, soup bowls, and sun hats. Busy day.
item.dc:creator: stonetemplefox05

item.description: He's way too skinny, plus it needs an orange face, bruised hands, a crusty looking neck rash, cankles, a sanitary napkin on his ear, and a gold crown.

item.title: GovBrief Today #430
item.description: The President of the United States spent Easter morning threatening to bomb 93 million people into darkness and signed it "Praise be to Allah." Donald Trump posted his ultimatum to Iran at 8:03 a.m. on the holiest day of the Christian calendar, then skipped church. He promised to destroy the country's power plants and bridges by Tuesday night if the Strait of Hormuz stays closed. The world, including our allies, saw it and understood that a man accused of being a burgeoning autocrat treats mass civilian suffering as a bargaining chip. In the summer of 1974, when congressional Republicans realized they couldn't save Richard Nixon, Barry Goldwater rode to the White House with Republican leaders and told the president it was over. It is time for their successors to make that same trip and tell this president that Americans will not stand for him killing innocents in a war they never wanted. Call your representatives through Resistbot and 5 Calls and demand Republican leadership go to the White House before the bombs fall. We've emailed 6,900+ stories over 430 straight nights. The algorithm doesn't always show them to you. Subscribe now at govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com Today on the Website: https://go.govbrief.today/260405-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-apr05 [2] https://go.govbrief.today/plo-pa-judgment [3] https://go.govbrief.today/congo-deport [4] https://go.govbrief.today/abbott-ai-image [5] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-threats [6] https://go.govbrief.today/gulf-funds-paramount Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: You never look in the barrel.
item.description: You just had to do it. One love.
item.dc:creator: Bruskey

item.title: I spent 3 months growing this alum crystal
item.description: I like growing crystals out of common household materials such as salt, sugar and fertilizer. And alum crystals are one of the easiest crystals to grow. Alum is a type of salt used in baking, deodorant and water purification. It's really easy to grow small diamond shaped crystals with alum, but I thought I'd challenge myself to see how big I could get them to grow, and here's the result. I'm pretty happy with it. If you guys are interested in growing your own crystals, you can find more info in this article that I wrote: https://crystalverse.com/why-you-should-grow-crystals/
item.dc:creator: crystalchase21
